session.user:
Run make fast-ci and report the full results including any failures.
make fast-ci
session.assistant: I'll run the `make fast-ci` command and report the results.

tool_use.name: Bash
tool_use.param: Run fast-ci target to execute quick CI checks

session.tool_result:
Exit code 2 [[33mwarn[39m] docs/learned/integrations/github-review-decision.md [[33mwarn[39m] docs/learned/tui/status-indicators.md [[33mwarn[39m] Code style issues found in 2 files. Run Prettier with --write to fix. ✓ AGENTS.md standard: PASSED
All CLAUDE.md and AGENTS.md files properly paired.
CLAUDE.md files checked: 19 Violations: 0 make: *** [Makefile:97: fast-ci] Error 1
=== Fast CI ===
--- Lint --- All checks passed!
--- Format Check --- 1674 files already formatted
--- Prettier Check --- Checking formatting...
--- Markdown Check ---
--- Exec Reference Check --- OK: .claude/skills/erk-exec/reference.md is up to date
--- ty --- All checks passed!
... [108 lines omitted] ...
session.assistant:
The command failed with exit code 2. Here's the summary:
## fast-ci Results: FAILED
**Exit Code:** 2 (Prettier formatting issues)
### Issues Found:
**Prettier Check - Code style issues found in 2 files:** 1. `docs/learned/integrations/github-review-decision.md` 2. `docs/learned/tui/status-indicators.md`
These files need formatting. Run `prettier --write` to fix.
### Passing Checks:
- Lint: PASSED (All checks passed!) - Format Check: PASSED (1674 files already formatted) - Markdown Check: PASSED - Exec Reference Check: PASSED - Type checking (ty): PASSED (All checks passed!) - Unit Tests (erk): PASSED (5910 passed in 12.59s) - Tests (erk-dev): PASSED (136 passed in 4.50s) - Tests (erk-statusline): PASSED (115 passed in 0.78s) - Tests (erk-mcp): PASSED (24 passed)
### Summary:
The fast-ci pipeline failed due to Prettier formatting issues in 2 markdown documentation files. All code quality checks, type checking, and unit tests passed successfully. The failure is purely a formatting issue in the documentation files.
